title: Burnt: Cold Sweat Compat
description: Bridge mod between Burnt and Cold Sweat
body:
![Mod Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a76df48a15ad65e5cb4ac79e0b927d3618553fbb_0.webp)
# Burnt: Cold Sweat Compat

BCC is a simple compatibility mod that makes Burnt mod's fire blocks, soul fire blocks and
entities affect player temperature in Cold Sweat.

## Features
- Burnt fire, soul fire, smoldering stuffs now affect player's temperature like what you wished for!
- Burnt's Wisp mob chills the player when nearby

## Requirements
- Burnt 1.9.0.3 and above
- Cold Sweat 2.4 and above

## Credits
- Logo uses assets from [Burnt](https://modrinth.com/mod/burnt) by pxlbnk and [Cold Sweat](https://modrinth.com/mod/cold-sweat) by Mikul, used with appreciation. This mod is not affiliated with either project.

## Note
- THE MOD IS STILL IN BETA PHASE, feel free to report bugs to keep the mod improved!
- No known incompatibilities
- Can be installed on server-side only
- I'm new to modding Minecraft, thank you for supporting :)

You can view the Github page [here](https://github.com/Webbfun/BCC)
